title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at KPMG India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at KPMG India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, KPMG India International Enterprises in Srinagar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About KPMG India International Enterprises:
KPMG India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPMG India International Enterprises!
